SetEntityPaused.mandatory1: <ignore> Whether or not to advance normally.

SetEntityTarget.summary: Set an entity as the AI's target. This is for special cases only. Do not set AI or player targets with this.
SetEntityTarget.mandatory1: <entity> An entity to target (cannot be server only entity).
SetEntityTarget.optional1: [threat] A fraction of maximum possible threat an AI can have. Must be in 0 to 1 range. Defaults to 1.
SetEntityTarget.optional2: [tag name] Tag to aim/shoot at on this entity. Defaults to tag_eye for actors/players".

SetEntityWeapon.summary: Set weapon ent field from script.

SetEverHadWeaponAll.summary: Set the EverHadAllPlayerHeldWeapons flag of the player

SetExcludeTeamForTrigger.summary: Set the team that this trigger will not react to. Reacts to all other teams.
SetExcludeTeamForTrigger.mandatory1: <team name> The name of the team that the trigger will not respond to. Must be either 'axis', 'allies', 'team3', 'team4', 'team5', 'team6' or 'none'

SetExpFog.mandatory1: <startDist> The distance, in world units, at which the fog begins.
SetExpFog.mandatory2: <halfwayDist> The distance, beyond the startDist, at which the scene will be 50% fogged.
SetExpFog.mandatory3: <red> The red component of the fog as a value between 0.0 and 1.0
SetExpFog.mandatory4: <green> The red component of the fog as a value between 0.0 and 1.0
SetExpFog.mandatory5: <blue> The red component of the fog as a value between 0.0 and 1.0

SetExposureActiveBank.summary: Set exposure volumes active bank bit mask.

SetExposureIgnoreTeleport.summary: Always do fully adaptive exposure and ignore teleports
SetExposureIgnoreTeleport.mandatory2: <enable> Enable or disable the exposure always adapt flag

SetExposureInstantSnap.summary: snap exposure to base calculated probe value, ignore iris adaption and damping
SetExposureInstantSnap.mandatory2: <enable> Enable or disable the exposure snap

SetExtraCam.summary: Activates the extra cam and sets the given entity as cam reference.
SetExtraCam.mandatory1: <camera index> which extra cam references this entity. Valid values are 0 - 3
SetExtraCam.optional1: <rendered width> Width of the extra cam rendered target. The width will be calculated from the height if width is negative (keeping the aspect ration at 16:9)
SetExtraCam.optional2: <rendered height> Height of the extra cam rendered target. The height will be calculated from the width if height is negative (keeping the aspect ration at 16:9)

SetExtraCamFocalLength.mandatory1: <camera index> which extra cam references this entity. Valid values are 0 - 3

SetExtraCamRenderReady.summary: Sets an extra cam render job to start processing

SetFOVForKillcam.summary: Sets the fov for use with this killcam entity.  Setting it to zero makes it use the default fov.
SetFOVForKillcam.mandatory1: <fov> The fov you want to use for the killcam

SetFXIgnorePause.summary: Tells an effect whether or not to respect a paused world state.
SetFXIgnorePause.mandatory1: <localClientNum> The local client the effect is playing on.
SetFXIgnorePause.mandatory2: <effect id> The effect id returned by playFx
SetFXIgnorePause.mandatory3: <ignore pause> Whether or not to respect a paused world state.

SetFXOutdoor.summary: Flag the FX as one that only plays outdoors.
SetFXOutdoor.mandatory1: <localClientNum> The local client the effect is playing on.
SetFXOutdoor.mandatory2: <effect id> The effect id returned by playFx

SetFXTeam.summary: Set the team of the fx either by team or by entity which has a team set.
SetFXTeam.mandatory1: <localClientNum> Local client on which to play the fx
SetFXTeam.mandatory2: <effect handle > The handle from the created fx
SetFXTeam.optional1: <invert team> Treat the team as the one to show the enemy fx for.

SetFakeFire.summary: Simulates gun fire.  Sound and radar blip.

SetFilterBitFlag.summary: Set or clear the filter bit flag

SetFilterPassCodeTexture.summary: Sets a code texture for a filter pass - the tetxure has be to created beforehand
SetFilterPassCodeTexture.mandatory5: <texture name> has to have been created by captureFrame() before - if empty string sets to null.

SetFilterPassEnabled.summary: Sets the filter pass enabled or disabled
SetFilterPassEnabled.optional1: [hdrFilter>] true/false - if true the filter is applied to the scene (HDR) otherwise will be applied after the LDT and dof (default false)
SetFilterPassEnabled.optional2: [firstPersonOnly>] true/false - if true the filter is applied to the scene only if you are in or spectating a player in first person

SetFixedNodeSafeVolume.summary: Set this actor's fixed node safe volume.

SetFlagAsAway.mandatory2: <away> A value of 1 sets the flag as away, 0 sets the flag as home

SetFlashBanged.summary: Sets whether an actor is under a flashbang effect.
SetFlashBanged.mandatory1: <flashed> Whether or not the actor is under the affect of a flashbang.
SetFlashBanged.optional1: [strength] If actor is flashed, how severely they were initially affected. Between 0.0 and 1.0 (full strength).

SetFlashbangImmunity.summary: Sets whether an actor is succeptable to flashbangs.
SetFlashbangImmunity.mandatory1: <immune> If the actor can be affected by flashbangs.

SetForceNoCull.summary: Sets the force-no-cull flag. Entity will not be culled by portals

SetForceNotSimple.summary: Set the forceNotSimple flag on the entity

SetFreeCameraLockOnAllowed.summary: Sets whether the ai is allowed to be locked onto in the demo free camera
SetFreeCameraLockOnAllowed.mandatory1: <allowed> boolean of whether it is allowed

SetFriendlyNameDraw.summary: turns on or off local client friendly name drawing
SetFriendlyNameDraw.mandatory1: <onOff> True if friendly name drawing is turned on

SetFriendlyScramblerAmount.summary: Sets the amount alpha of the friendly scrambler applied

SetGameEndTime.summary: Sets the time the current match will end

SetGameTypeString.summary: Set the game type string for the game
SetGameTypeString.mandatory1: <game type> A string containing the game type

SetGametypeSetting.summary: Sets the value of a gametype setting.
SetGametypeSetting.mandatory1: <setting> The setting name as a string.
SetGametypeSetting.mandatory2: <value> The new value for the setting.

SetGenericSceneValue.summary: Sets one of the 16 generic scene vectors used by SW shaders.
SetGenericSceneValue.mandatory3: <value> Some generic float used by SW shaders.

SetGoal.summary: Set this AI 's goal. Any of the above function name will work. They all call into SetGoal function internally.
SetGoal.optional1: [forced](bool) should go directly to this pos/node/entity. Forced means AI will get within approx 4 units of the entity.
SetGoal.optional2: [goalradius] radius of the goal. Applicable for entity and position/node and not the volume or forcedGoal.
SetGoal.optional3: [goalheight] height of the goal. Applicable for entity and position/node and not the volume or forcedGoal.

SetGoalYaw.summary: Set the goal yaw direction for this vehicle. Goal yaw is ignored if vehicle doesn't stop at goal. Lookat entity has priority over goal yaw
SetGoalYaw.mandatory1: <integer> The yaw direction of the target: 0 to 360 integer value

SetGrapplableType.summary: Set how an entity is grappled.

SetGravity.summary: sets the gravity in inches per second per second.

SetGunnerTargetEnt.summary: Set the target entity for this vehicle gunner.

SetGunnerTargetVec.summary: Set the target position for this vehicle turret gunner.
SetGunnerTargetVec.mandatory1: <target position> vecter to aim at/ the position of the target

SetGunnerTurretOnTargetRange.summary: Set the range at which the gunner_turret_on_target notify will occur.

SetHeliDogfighting.summary: Sets the vehicle (intended for VTOLs only) to be in dogfighting mode (dogfights with the vehicle's focus entity)
SetHeliDogfighting.mandatory1: <enabled> true to enable dogfighting, false otherwise

SetHeliHeightCap.summary: Pulls the heli back down below the height mesh

SetHeliHeightLock.summary: Locks the heli to the height mesh
SetHeliHeightLock.mandatory1: <enabled> true to enable lock, false otherwise

SetHeliHeightPatchEnabled.summary: Enabled or disables the specified heli height lock path
SetHeliHeightPatchEnabled.mandatory1: <targetname> All heli height lock patches with this target name
SetHeliHeightPatchEnabled.optional1: [player] If defined, only modify the setting for that player

SetHideWhenScriptedAnimationCompleted.summary: When playing a scene this will hide the entity when the scripted animation ends on it.

SetHideonClientWhenScriptedAnimCompleted.summary: hides the entity on the client side onces its scripted animation ends

SetHighDetail.summary: Enabled or Disables High Detail rendering for a model
SetHighDetail.optional1: [flag] True or False, enabled or disabled

SetHintLowPriority.summary: Sets this as a low priority hint which is lower priority then everything other then turrets and dropped weapons
SetHintLowPriority.mandatory1: <bool> True\False if its on or off

SetHintString.summary: Set the hint string for the entity
SetHintString.example: t_door SetHintString( "Press and Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to transmit unlock code" )
SetHintString.mandatory1: <hint string> The hint string that will be displayed to the player
SetHintString.optional1: [...] Additional arguments may be appended to the hint string

SetHintStringForPerk.summary: Shows this hint string to the player if the player has the specified perk
SetHintStringForPerk.mandatory1: <perk> The perk that the player needs to have to see this hint string
SetHintStringForPerk.mandatory2: <hint string> The hint string that will be displayed to the player that has the perk

SetHintStringForPlayer.summary: Sets the trigger hint string for one specific player
SetHintStringForPlayer.mandatory1: <player> The player that will see the hint string
SetHintStringForPlayer.mandatory2: <hint string> The hint string that will be displayed to the player
SetHintStringForPlayer.optional1: [...] Additional arguments may be appended to the hint string in the same way as SetHintString.

SetIgnoreEnt.summary: Set a sentient entity to ignore another specific sentient entity or not

SetIgnoreEntForTrigger.summary: Ignores this entity when doing trigger sight traces. Currently only works for trigger_radius_use
SetIgnoreEntForTrigger.mandatory1: <entity to ignore> The entity that will be ignored during sight trace checks

SetIgnoreMeGroup.summary: Make first group ignored by second group

SetIgnorePauseWorld.summary: Sets whether a given entity will advance normally when the world is paused.
SetIgnorePauseWorld.mandatory1: <ignore> Whether or not to advance normally when the world is paused.

SetIncludeMeshes.summary: Sets a streamer hint entity to include mesh data

SetInfluenceAt.summary: Sets the influence value on the influence map, returns true/false if the value was set.
SetInfluenceAt.mandatory2: <origin> The location to set the influence value

SetInfluencerTeamMask.summary: Sets the team mask for the given influencer
SetInfluencerTeamMask.mandatory2: <team mask> The team mask to apply

SetInfluencerTimeout.summary: Sets the timeout for the influencer in seconds from current time

SetInfraredVision.summary: Switches using the infrared vision (infrared visionset and thermal characters)
SetInfraredVision.mandatory1: <is infrared vision> Whether using infrared vision

SetInfraredVisionSet.summary: Set the vision when using infrared

SetInitialPlayersConnected.summary: Set initialPlayersConnected bool in match state to true

SetInventoryHeldWeapon.mandatory1: <weapon> The held weapon to be set as inventoryHeldWeapon. Use undefined to clear the inventoryHeldWeapon.

SetInvisibleToAll.summary: Set entity invisible to all players

SetInvisibleToPlayer.summary: Make the entity invisible to the player
SetInvisibleToPlayer.mandatory1: <player> The player to set the entity invisible to.
SetInvisibleToPlayer.optional1: [setInvisible] True if entity has to be invisible to player. False otherwise

SetJitterParams.summary: Set the jitter parameters. Set everything to 0 to stop jittering. Vehicle ignores jitter parameters when on ground
SetJitterParams.example: self SetJitterParams( (0,0,20), 0.5, 1.5 ); // Jitter up or down randomly within 20 units, switching every 0.5 to 1.5 seconds
SetJitterParams.optional1: [min period] Minimum time in seconds to switch jitter direction. Default 0.5 sec
SetJitterParams.optional2: [max period] Maximum time in seconds to switch jitter direction. Default 1.0 sec

SetJumpHeight.summary: Set the global jump height of all players.  Minimum value of 0, maximum value of 1023.
SetJumpHeight.mandatory1: <height_in_inches> The height to jump in inches

SetLUIMenuData.fullAPI: SetLUIMenuData(<lui menu handle>,<lui menu data name>,<lui menu data value>)
SetLUIMenuData.summary: Sets a data value for a given lui menu, the data name has to be precached and the value as well, if its a string.
SetLUIMenuData.mandatory1: <lui menu handle> handle to the lui menu opened.
SetLUIMenuData.mandatory2: <lui menu data name> precached name string for the data which we're trying to set.
SetLUIMenuData.mandatory3: <lui menu data value> value for the data which we're trying to set on the menu.

SetLightColor.summary: Sets the current color of the light, as an RGB vector.
SetLightColor.mandatory1: <color> An RGB vector with components in the range 0 to 1. The given values get rounded before they are stored. (vector3)

SetLightExponent.summary: Sets the current exponent of the light.
SetLightExponent.mandatory1: <exponent> A new value for the exponent of the light. This should be an integer in the range of 0 to 100. (integer)

SetLightFovRange.summary: Sets the current fov range of the light.
SetLightFovRange.mandatory1: <fov_outer> A new value for the outer FOV of the light, in degrees. This cannot be larger than the fov when the map was compiled, or less than 1. (float)
SetLightFovRange.optional1: [fov_inner] A new value for the inner FOV of the light, in degrees. This cannot be larger than fov_outer, or less than 0. If not specified, the map value is used. (float)

SetLightIntensity.summary: Sets the current intensity of the light.
SetLightIntensity.mandatory1: <intensity> A new value for the intensity of the light. 1 is fullbright, but values can be larger than 1. (float)

SetLightRadius.summary: Sets the current radius of the light.
SetLightRadius.mandatory1: <radius> A new value for the radius of the light. This cannot be larger than the radius when the map was compiled. (float)

SetLightingOnly.summary: Sets a streamer hint entity to only hint lighting data

SetLightingState.summary: Changes lighting state for the map
SetLightingState.mandatory1: <new light state> new state to change to. Lighting state defaults to 1 at start of game

SetLitFogBank.summary: Sets which bank to use for all lit fog volumes with matching script id
SetLitFogBank.mandatory2: <scriptid> Volume identifier set in Radiant. (0-255). -1 = all.
SetLitFogBank.mandatory4: <time> Time in seconds to make the transition over. -1 to use the 'fogtime' parameter set in the volume.

SetLocalRadarEnabled.summary: Sets whether a client's local radar is enabled.
SetLocalRadarEnabled.mandatory1: <localClientNum> Client number to set local radar on

SetLocalRadarPosition.summary: Sets the position of a client's local radar.
SetLocalRadarPosition.mandatory1: <localClientNum> Client number to set local radar position on
SetLocalRadarPosition.mandatory2: <position> New position of the local radar

SetLookAtEnt.summary: Set the entity this vehicle will orient towards.

SetLookAtOrigin.summary: Set the origin this vehicle will orient towards.

SetLoopState.summary: set pitch and volume per entity/alias

SetLowReady.summary: set the player into low ready weapon state.

SetLutVolumeActiveBank.summary: Set lut volumes active bank bit mask.

SetMantleEnabled.summary: Sets the mantle enabled flag on the vehicle
SetMantleEnabled.mandatory1: <enabled> True to set the mantle enabled, false otherwise

SetMapCenter.summary: Set the center of the map (used by the network code to optimize position data)

SetMapLatLong.summary: Sets the map's real world latitude & longitude and their corresponding map coordinates.
SetMapLatLong.mandatory1: <mapX> map X coordinate for which the longitude is given
SetMapLatLong.mandatory2: <mapY> map Y coordinate for which the longitude is given
SetMapLatLong.mandatory3: <longitude> world longitude of the given map position
SetMapLatLong.mandatory4: <latitude> world latitude of the given map position

SetMapNameString.mandatory1: <map name> A string containing the map name

SetMatchFlag.summary: Flags a bit in the match state
SetMatchFlag.mandatory1: <flag bit> The flag bit to change
SetMatchFlag.mandatory2: <value> The new value of the bit

SetMatchTalkFlag.summary: Flags a bit in the match talk state
SetMatchTalkFlag.mandatory1: <flag bit> The flag bit to change
SetMatchTalkFlag.mandatory2: <value> The new value of the bit

SetMaxAccelerationScale.summary: Sets the max acceleration scale for this physics vehicle.
SetMaxAccelerationScale.mandatory1: <scale> The acceleration scale of the physics vehicle

SetMaxPitchRoll.summary: Sets max pitch and roll angle for this vehicle.

SetMaxSpeedScale.summary: Sets the max speed scale for this physics vehicle.
SetMaxSpeedScale.mandatory1: <scale> The max speed scale of the physics vehicle

SetMinDesiredTurnYaw.summary: The vehicle will not update its desired yaw until the min turn yaw is reached. Set it to 0 to clear it.
SetMinDesiredTurnYaw.mandatory1: <yaw> The min desired turn yaw to set

SetMiniMap.summary: Sets the minimap bounds and material

SetMissileBrake.summary: Tells a remote missile to disable brake
SetMissileBrake.mandatory1: <flag> True to enable or disable missile brake.

SetMissileCoasting.summary: Tells a remote missile to start coasting at a reduced speed.
SetMissileCoasting.mandatory1: <flag> True to start coasting at reduced speed.

SetMode.summary: Set the mode of a turret.
SetMode.mandatory1: <mode> The turret mode. Possible modes are "auto_ai", "manual", "manual_ai" and "auto_nonai

SetModel.summary: Set the model for the entity

SetModelLodBias.mandatory1: <bias> bias. Setting of 0 reverts to the model lod bias.

SetMoveSpeedScale.summary: Sets the speed scale multiplier for the entity
SetMoveSpeedScale.mandatory1: <speed scale multiplier> The speed scale multiplier (float)

SetNearGoalNotifyDist.summary: Set distance near goal at which near_goal notification should be sent once.

SetNoLOSOnTargetsHint.optional1: [weapon]: Weapon to use for the event

SetNoTargetsHint.optional1: [weapon]: Weapon to use for the event

SetNodePriority.summary: Enable or disable the priority for this node.
SetNodePriority.mandatory2: <enable> (boolean) True if this node is enabled.

SetNormalHealth.summary: Set health of entity. Input health is normalized.
SetNormalHealth.mandatory1: <normal health> Health in normalized form. Range 0 - 1

SetObjectivePointStatus.summary: Objective status set in the match state
SetObjectivePointStatus.mandatory1: <objective_index> The objective index in the matchstate

SetOffhandSecondaryClass.summary: Set whether the player is using a flash or smoke grenade.

SetOffhandVisible.summary: Enable or disable visibility of the offhand weapon

SetOnTargetAngle.summary: Set the angle range at which the turret_on_target notify will occur.

SetPBGActiveBank.summary: Set PBG bank mask from script.

SetParagonIconId.summary: Sets the player's paragon icon id
SetParagonIconId.mandatory1: <paragon icon id> the paragon rank id

SetParagonRank.mandatory1: <paragon rank id> the paragon rank id

SetPathTransitionTime.summary: Set the time it takes for a vehicle to lerp on to a spline.

SetPauseWorld.summary: pauses playback of animations and effects, but doesn't affect the server tick the way slomo does
SetPauseWorld.mandatory1: <pause> Whether or not to pause the world

SetPerkForTrigger.summary: Set the perk that the player must have for this trigger will react to
SetPerkForTrigger.mandatory1: <perk name> The name of the perk that the trigger will respond to.

SetPerks.summary: Sets a hud element to be a perks element.
SetPerks.mandatory1: <client> client we should be showing the perks of

SetPersonalIgnore.summary: self will not pick enemy as target for the duration
SetPersonalIgnore.mandatory2: <enemy> The enemy to set threat bias for
SetPersonalIgnore.optional1: [duration] How long this threat bias lasts in seconds

SetPersonalThreatBias.summary: Sets a personal threat bias for this sentient versus the other sentient.  It lasts for the given duration.
SetPersonalThreatBias.mandatory2: <enemy> The enemy to set threat bias for
SetPersonalThreatBias.optional1: [duration] How long this threat bias lasts in seconds

SetPhysAngles.summary: Sets the angles on the phys structure

SetPhysParams.summary: Sets the collision bounds for an actor.

SetPlacementHint.summary: Sets the placement hint string that will be displayed for this player.
SetPlacementHint.mandatory1: <onoff> true if the hint should say that the weapon can be placed, false if not

SetPlaneBarrelRoll.summary: Set the goal Roll direction for this plane. PLANE_ON_CURVE has priority over ROLL if this is not set.

SetPlaneGoalPos.summary: Set the target position, speed, angles for this vehicle.

SetPlayerCollision.summary: Use to turn on off the collision with the player.
SetPlayerCollision.mandatory1: <on_off> True for on and false for off

SetPlayerCurrentObjective.summary: Sets the current objective information on the player
SetPlayerCurrentObjective.mandatory1: <objective_index> The objective index in the matchstate

SetPlayerCurrentStreak.summary: Sets the current kill streak count on the player
SetPlayerCurrentStreak.mandatory1: <current streak> The current kill streak count

SetPlayerGravity.summary: Sets the gravity override value for the player.

SetPlayerIgnoreRadiusDamage.summary: Set the player to take or ignore radius damage
SetPlayerIgnoreRadiusDamage.mandatory1: <flag> true to ignore radius damage, false otherwise

SetPlayerNameString.summary: Set the player name string for a HUD element

SetPlayerSpread.summary: Sets the spread of this turret when used by the player
SetPlayerSpread.mandatory1: <spread> The spread of the turret in degrees

SetPlayerStateLoadoutBonusCards.summary: Set the player state to have bonus card info, for codcaster to view it

SetPlayerStateLoadoutWeapons.summary: Set the player state to have primary and secondary weapon info, for codcaster to view it

SetPotentialThreat.summary: In non-combat situations. This is mostly useful for friendlies.
SetPotentialThreat.mandatory1: <dir> direction of the threat. This is the angle from which the NPC should expect danger

SetPulseFX.summary: Set the hudelem string to display with a "Pulse" effect.
SetPulseFX.mandatory1: <speed> Time (in milliseconds) each letter takes to type out.
SetPulseFX.mandatory2: <decayStart> Time to wait before starting the string's decay effect.

SetRank.summary: Sets the player's rank and prestige level

SetRedactFX.summary: Set the hudelem string to display with a redact effect.
SetRedactFX.mandatory1: <decayStart> Time to wait before starting the text decay effect.
SetRedactFX.mandatory3: <redactDecayStart> Time to wait before starting the redact decay effect.

SetRenderInThirdPersonSpectate.summary: render the entity when spectated in 3rd person.
SetRenderInThirdPersonSpectate.mandatory1: <enable> Enable or disable redering the entity in 3rd person

SetRepairPaths.summary: True allows havok to repath automatically if the AI moves off their predefined path.
SetRepairPaths.mandatory1: <on_off> true to enable repair paths, false otherwise

SetReviveHintString.summary: Set the revive hint string to show to all or to a team.
SetReviveHintString.mandatory1: <hint string> The hint string that will be displayed to the player that has the perk
SetReviveHintString.optional1: [team] The team to show the hint to

SetRimIntensity.summary: Global character skin/cloth rim lighting intensity.

SetRiotshieldFailHint.optional1: [weapon]: Weapon to use for the event

SetRippleWave.fullAPI: SetRippleWave(<client>,<center xpos>,<center ypos>,<width>,<speed scale>,<amplitude width ratio>,<fade in start>,<fade in end>,<fade out start>,<fade out end>)
SetRippleWave.summary: Trigger vertex ripple wave for material set to use it.
SetRippleWave.mandatory7: <fade in start> The fade in at start
SetRippleWave.mandatory8: <fade in end> The fade in at the end
SetRippleWave.mandatory9: <fade out start> The fade out at start
SetRippleWave.mandatory10: <fade out end> The fade out at the end

SetRotorSpeed.mandatory1: <speed> The rotor speed, 0 is stopped 1 is full speed.

SetRoundsPlayed.summary: Set rounds played in match state

SetSAnim.summary: Set the anim shot to play on a static model
SetSAnim.mandatory1: <string anim name> name of a SANIM asset
SetSAnim.optional1: [string shot name] shot name of the sub animation to play, pass in <int> 0 to play the first one.
SetSAnim.optional2: [float time] frame to start playing on, default is 0.

SetSModelSAnimShot.summary: Set the anim shot to play on a static model
SetSModelSAnimShot.mandatory1: <target name> target name of the static model or <int index> The index of the static model or <array int indices> The indices of the static models (string)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional1: [shot name] shot name of the sub animation to play, pass in <int> 0 to play the first one. (string)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional2: [time] frame to start playing on, pass in -1 to use the static model random frame, this is the default. (float)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional3: [loop] this is unused, looping is set in the asset editor. (integer)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional4: [append] If !0 the animation will be played after the current animation(s), any loop flags in current animations are ignored. If 0, it will replace the current and any appended animation with the current one.(integer)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional5: [blend] If !0 new animation will blend into the new one. default is 0 (integer)
SetSModelSAnimShot.optional6: [frames to blend] If number of frames to blend over (float)

SetScale.summary: Set the model scale on a script mover.

SetScanningPitch.summary: Set the pitch that the turret attempts to use while scanning for enemies.
SetScanningPitch.mandatory1: <pitch> of the turret (up and down) in degrees.

SetScriptMoverFlag.summary: Sets flag 0-7 on the script mover ent.

SetScriptStreamBias.summary: Sets the base importance of materials being forced from script
SetScriptStreamBias.mandatory1: <bias> Streaming bias (0 is the highest importance)

SetSeatOccupied.summary: Sets this seat to be occupied/disabled (for players.

SetServerVolumetricFogDensity.summary: Set the density of server volumetric fog
SetServerVolumetricFogDensity.mandatory3: <time> The time to lerp to the new value

SetSessStat.mandatory1: <stat path> The path to the stat to set the value for.

SetShader.summary: Set the material for this Hud Element
SetShader.mandatory1: <materialname> A the name of the material to set

SetSharedViewPort.summary: Sets the view mode to either shared or independent, shared combines all views into a single shared viewport, modifies the way input is handled, and places the camera into scripted camera mode (i.e. control it with script).
SetSharedViewPort.mandatory1: <mode> true if shared viewport, false for independent (default splitscreen behavior)

SetShowcaseWeaponPaintshopXUID.summary: Set the showcase weapon paintshop XUID for the given local client num

SetSlowMotion.summary: sets the current slow motion timescale interpolation.
SetSlowMotion.optional2: [deltaTime] The time to go from start to end timescale. Default to 1. (in seconds)

SetSonarAttachmentEnabled.summary: Set the sonar attachment to be enabled or disabled

SetSpawnClientFlag.summary: Set a flag on a client's spawn client data in the spawning system.

SetSpawnPointRandomVariation.summary: Random value will be added into the spawn point weighting calculation.

SetSpawnPointsBaseWeight.summary: If the spawn point is facing the objective position then it will have an additional score applied
SetSpawnPointsBaseWeight.mandatory1: <team mask> teams that this command will affect
SetSpawnPointsBaseWeight.mandatory2: <objective position> Position of the objective that will be used in the facing calculations
SetSpawnPointsBaseWeight.mandatory3: <angle> max angle that will be accepted
SetSpawnPointsBaseWeight.mandatory4: <score> additional score that will be applied

SetSpawnWeapon.summary: Set the weapon that this player will spawn with
SetSpawnWeapon.example: self SetSpawnWeapon( "ak47" )during prematch period or grace period in mp)
SetSpawnWeapon.mandatory1: <weapon name> The name of the weapon to spawn with

SetSpeed.summary: Sets the speed and acceleration for this vehicle.
SetSpeed.mandatory1: <speed> The speed of the vehicle in miles per hour
SetSpeed.optional1: [acceleration] The acceleration of the vehicle in miles per hour per second
SetSpeed.optional2: [deceleration] Deceleration. If not specified, set to be equal to half of accleration

SetSpeedImmediate.summary: Sets the speed and acceleration for this vehicle instantaneously. Direction will be toward the goal direction if there is a goal, otherwise the current direction.

serverfieldregister.summary: Register a server field. Server fields are variable bit length fields communicated from client to server
serverfieldregister.example: RegisterServerField("my_field", 2, "int"); // registers an int field with 2 bits of resolution, that can hold the values 0,1,2,3.
serverfieldregister.mandatory1: <name> Unique name to identify the field.
serverfieldregister.mandatory2: <num bits> How many bits to use for the field. Valid values are in the range of 1-32. Only ask for as many as you need.
serverfieldregister.mandatory3: <type> Type of the field. Currently supported types "int" or "float"
serverfieldregister.mandatory4: <callback> Function that gets called when the value changes (each client can toggle this bit independently of the others)

serverfieldsetval.summary: Register a server field.  server fields are variable bit length fields communicated from client to server
serverfieldsetval.example: RegisterServerField("my_field", VERSION_SHIP, 2, "int", ::my_cb_func); // registers a world int field with 2 bits of resolution, that can hold the values 0,1,2,3.
serverfieldsetval.mandatory2: <name> Unique name to identify the field.
